Explanation of codes:
    - = Unknown
    A = Additional information
  Antenna being used:
    B = Beam
    D = Dipole
    V = Vertical
  Internet(details)
    E = Email address of sysop - if not listed, use callsign@winlink.org
    H = Homepage URL
